description: Detects calls to the deprecated mysql_* extension functions removed in PHP 7.0. Simplified from Rust: flags all function_call_expression nodes whose function name starts with mysql_. Cannot restrict to the exact allowlist of ~50 removed functions without #match? predicate support. Expect some false positives for user-defined mysql_* helpers.

flag.message: function call detected -- verify this is not a deprecated mysql_* extension call (mysql_connect, mysql_query, etc.) -- migrate to mysqli or PDO
